name: Zephyr Teachout for Demand Progress
subject: The first big fight of Biden’s presidency
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEMAND PROGRESS (<a href="http://demandprogress
body: Dear Peter, Four years ago, Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans stole a Supreme Court seat by refusing to even consider Barack Obama’s nomination of Merrick Garland. Now Mitch McConnell is poised to try to do the same thing to Joe Biden's entire cabinet. Already, a narrative is emerging in the mainstream media that Joe Biden will need to select conservative Democrats or even Republicans for key positions, like attorney general, in order to get them confirmed by a McConnell-controlled Senate.^1 We know how important it is that Biden pick a cabinet that represents the millions of progressive votes he received in this election. That's why I'm helping Demand Progress to start organizing now to convince the Biden administration and Senate Democrats that they need to play hardball and fight for a cabinet that will implement a strong progressive agenda. [ https://act.demandprogress.org/go/33915?amount=5&t=1001&akid=27291%2E8104458%2E9xm2wM ]Will you make a donation to Demand Progress to support their work to stop Mitch McConnell from blocking Joe Biden’s entire cabinet? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ https://act.demandprogress.org/go/34008?t=1002&akid=27291%2E8104458%2E9xm2wM ]Donate $20 [ https://act.demandprogress.org/go/34009?t=1003&akid=27291%2E8104458%2E9xm2wM ]Donate $40 [ https://act.demandprogress.org/go/34010?t=1004&akid=27291%2E8104458%2E9xm2wM ]Donate $75 [ https://act.demandprogress.org/go/34011?t=1005&akid=27291%2E8104458%2E9xm2wM ]Or, donate another amount Make no mistake, Joe Biden does NOT have to let Mitch McConnell block his cabinet or dictate who he nominates. He has the power under the Constitution to select the cabinet he wants even if Senate Republicans link arms to block any nominee, the way they blocked Obama’s Supreme Court nominee: * Biden can use the Vacancies Act. The Vacancies Act provides an indisputably legal channel to fill Senate-confirmed positions when confirmations are delayed. The Act has been used extensively by presidents of both parties, including by Trump to an unprecedented degree, even with a Republican-controlled Senate. * Biden can adjourn Congress and make recess appointments. The Constitution gives the president the power to adjourn Congress "to such time as he shall think proper, and after 10 days of recess, the President may make recess appointments to fill positions that typically require Senate confirmation. Biden can only deliver the kind of change Americans expect with a strong cabinet committed to a progressive agenda. A McConnell-approved cabinet will be nothing but a continuation of the government by and for corporate America that American voters have just rejected. I've fought for years to show that that strong progressive values that serve people over corporations can help put the country on the right path. We have a huge opportunity to staff Biden's administration with cabinet members who can end Citizens United, provide affordable housing and health care, and protect workers' rights. But to do that, we need to first fight back against the growing media narrative that Biden must “compromise” with McConnell on his cabinet and build support in the Senate for recess and acting appointments to get the nomination Biden needs. [ https://act.demandprogress.org/go/33915?amount=5&t=1006&akid=27291%2E8104458%2E9xm2wM ]Will you join me in supporting Demand Progress' fight to stop Mitch McConnell from sabatoging Biden’s entire presidency? In solidarity Zephyr Teachout for Demand Progress [ https://act.demandprogress.org/go/33915?amount=5&t=1007&akid=27291%2E8104458%2E9xm2wM ]DONATE Source: 1. The Hill, "Will McConnell flout custom by rejecting Biden Cabinet nominees?," [ https://act.demandprogress.org/go/33920?t=1008&akid=27291%2E8104458%2E9xm2wM ]November 10, 2020 ---------- PAID FOR BY DEMAND PROGRESS (DemandProgress.org) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Join our online community on Facebook or Twitter. You can unsubscribe from this list at any time: http://act.demandprogress.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=27291%2E8104458%2E9xm2wM

name: Mr. Snerdley
subject: Georgia Runoff Elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Journey PAC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56327403:JIW0W0bNU:m:1:3206719985:5D96F8900107710AF136E00BFB8F6CA6:r "Senate") Peter: Like so many conservative warriors, my staff and I are tired and disheartened by the apparent results of the Presidential election. President Trump is a once in a generation leader, and I am worried about the future of our nation under a Biden-Harris regime. **My name is James Golden, but you may know me better as Bo Snerdley - producer and call screener for the one and only Rush Limbaugh. I started the New Journey PAC to help Black Republican candidates across the country.** _As Trump fights to ensure that every legal vote is counted , there is a fight we cannot ignore. There are two runoff elections for U.S. Senate in Georgia, and the results of these elections will decide which party controls the Senate._ **THIS IS OUR CHANCE TO PUT A CHECK ON JOE BIDEN 'S POWER AND WE NEED YOUR HELP TO ENSURE WE SUCCEED.** **[The full weight of the Democrat Party's campaign machine will converge on Georgia, and we need to start fighting for victory TODAY. Will you chip in $50 right now to our Georgia Victory Fund?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56327404:JIW0W0bNU:m:1:3206719985:5D96F8900107710AF136E00BFB8F6CA6:r "The
full weight of the Democrat Party’s campaign machine will converge on Georgia, and we need to start fighting for victory TODAY. Will you chip
in $50 right now to our Georgia Victory Fund?")** I know you are tired, but we cannot rest until Republicans have secured control of the U.S. Senate. Control of the Senate will be a firewall against the progressive agenda to pass a Green New Deal, force a national lockdown and the defunding of law enforcement. **We are 100% supported by donations from conservatives like you.** **[Please donate as much as you can to this critical fight before it is too late.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56327403:JIW0W0bNU:m:1:3206719985:5D96F8900107710AF136E00BFB8F6CA6:r "Please
donate as much as you can to this critical fight before it is too late.")** We all know that Joe Biden's White House will belong to Nancy Pelosi, Kamala Harris and AOC's Squad. They know that they only have a few years to enact their socialist programs, and they will move quickly. If we can make sure that Mitch McConnell is a firewall in the Senate, we can stop their plan before it starts. The Democrats aren't stupid, they are doing the same math we are, and they know how important these runoffs are to the future of our nation. Democrat operatives are booking flights RIGHT NOW and we need to get to Georgia and start fighting. **[Will you do all you can to help us win these 2 Senate races? Our Senate Majority depends on it.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56327403:JIW0W0bNU:m:1:3206719985:5D96F8900107710AF136E00BFB8F6CA6:r "Will you do all you can to help us win these 2 Senate races? Our
Senate Majority depends on it.")** For a New Journey, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/56327403:JIW0W0bNU:m:1:3206719985:5D96F8900107710AF136E00BFB8F6CA6:r "James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley")
James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley
Founder, New Journey PAC
---
| **Paid for by New Journey PAC
Not Authorized by Any Candidate or Candidate's Committee**

name: John James
subject: IMPORTANT: every vote must count
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John James for Senate, Inc
body:
Peter - I have an important announcement, and I need you to
read this entire email.
This is incredibly personal to me. I put my life on
the line in Iraq to defend a fledgling democracy, and I flew
missions to protect free and fair elections. I care deeply about
the elections that take place in Michigan - my home, and where I
am raising my children.

This campaign is not about me, it never has been.
It's about making sure the People of Michigan have been heard
loud and clear.

Elections must be free, fair, and honest.
That is the principle at the foundation of our
democracy, and the People of Michigan deserve to know for a fact
that their vote has been counted. We must protect the integrity
of our electoral process above all else - if we do not, our
democracy will be in grave danger.
Voters must have confidence that our elections have
been conducted with integrity and that they were not
disenfranchised.
Although Senator Peters is ahead, I have deep
concerns that a sizable number of Michiganders may have been
disenfranchised.
That's why I have asked my team to investigate and
determine. I am 100% committed to making sure that every single
legal vote is counted.
I'm emailing you right now to help me fund this
fight for free and fair elections in Michigan - I need your help
to make sure my team has the resources they need to make sure
every valid ballot has been counted (you can donate here:
https://secure.winred.com/john-james-for-senate-inc/donate-1712512/)

When the process is complete, I will, of course,
accept the results and the will of the people.
But right now, there are enough widely reported
inconsistencies to warrant an investigation to ensure that
elections were conducted in a transparent, legal, and fair
manner. Those who object to this fair and legal process likely
have something to hide.
If you want to help me ensure that the People of
Michigan can trust democracy now and in the future, please help
me get the resources to continue the fight.
Donate here:
https://secure.winred.com/john-james-for-senate-inc/donate-1712512/
Let's Fly,

John James

Paid for by the John James for Senate, Inc.

post-election efforts.

of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in

By providing your cell phone or mobile phone number

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: RAPHAEL WARNOCK REFUSES TO ANSWER QUESTIONS ABOUT CHILD ABUSE INVESTIGATION
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE FRIDAY, NOVEMBER 13, 2020
RAPHAEL WARNOCK REFUSES TO ANSWER QUESTIONS ABOUT CHILD ABUSE INVESTIGATION
ATLANTA - As [revealed](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019Iwg_DXa9LCokwsxYG6mezFNcjCQkrdLQDNJE8OYG6YQhxvChDVPuIDZm2jNaS2dBDBCCGj1gRciD2fPnSVWEso6t19YRftEt-B6M9tkRr3phonelIpJRvMGsYmnSOrVLIThSEa6cTDi-VUa9v9vj0xoOtlK3RfR8sUQj31kmj3AAvN1RkBdpo1vUBe63bm1qesT5VcEPZqGgM0YAcLkmjzaZW0X6K6R&c=x_TuSlVuGI7PM5vp91wx52WJ-9Y7QM8tLJRuGO77b_BFDKuCjfeqtQ==&ch=_g5zi0rCYRQLxmGurmZzTWgEsYYbBdCdoiPpx3uV58DP-YAGX0u9tA==) this week, Raphael Warnock was arrested in 2002 for obstructing a police investigation into suspected child abuse that occurred under his purview. Warnock was a [senior pastor](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019Iwg_DXa9LCokwsxYG6mezFNcjCQkrdLQDNJE8OYG6YQhxvChDVPuIDZm2jNaS2dYtvhr8vSnC3zp5PkPJz7KMPrMkfyQiGeuUHS5lwyAoDGhdomb7nzNuNAyUjxIPNy8rFL8rEaJGXEs6I_4ROGOXKC1K5-ax-Gm7RVTYKQ5j4FmbX7tKYYLmBoVOzCXWA2ll1h1PCuyaE3Ze4PnikhHaQ5ryMzr81O1Ge_5KqwL83nmPO9xYMhiM6X43VPKQgbf7VIH1TdH3CuiC3QZG3aGDcGDUSxadPMCzhn3qeJ7agcfsdNu-qyjg==&c=x_TuSlVuGI7PM5vp91wx52WJ-9Y7QM8tLJRuGO77b_BFDKuCjfeqtQ==&ch=_g5zi0rCYRQLxmGurmZzTWgEsYYbBdCdoiPpx3uV58DP-YAGX0u9tA==) at the Douglas Memorial Community Church in Baltimore, which was running a summer camp where there was suspected child abuse occurring. When police attempted to investigate the allegations at Camp Farthest Out, Warnock and another pastor obstructed their investigation - and later tried to prevent a camper from talking to the police. As [reported](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019Iwg_DXa9LCokwsxYG6mezFNcjCQkrdLQDNJE8OYG6YQhxvChDVPuIDZm2jNaS2duWzBduWGAgzLTJGFQp0YMLfpJc3K2lWgtOwnK3SBt2aGimqXDHqSSA9JhggPTL0jH-KT0_5534xn8P7lnnNiDp5V-u3SaTDNqab8tnN91E2InMUAuBvYG59kQaGn2pgcRioSxMSURYc1ewyNXuZC5g==&c=x_TuSlVuGI7PM5vp91wx52WJ-9Y7QM8tLJRuGO77b_BFDKuCjfeqtQ==&ch=_g5zi0rCYRQLxmGurmZzTWgEsYYbBdCdoiPpx3uV58DP-YAGX0u9tA==) by the Baltimore Sun at the time, arresting officers from the Child and Sexual Assault Unit had "never encountered resistance like [Warnock's] at all."
In the days since this story resurfaced, Warnock has refused to answer any questions about what happened, including:

* Why were police called to investigate child abuse at Camp Farthest Out?
* What was the nature of the child abuse in question?
* How many people were involved?
* What was his involvement?
* How much did he know?

"If Raphael Warnock wants Georgia voters to believe anything he says, he needs to come clean, answer these very simple questions, and explain what happened," said Communications Director Stephen Lawson.
---
| ### Stephen Lawson Communications Director stephen@kellyforsenate.com
---
|
Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler

| | Georgians for Kelly Loeffler | 9755 Dogwood Rd Suite 340, Roswell, GA 30075

The potential voter fraud we’re uncovering in Michigan is UNPRECEDENTED. We’re doing everything we can to FIGHT BACK, but we can’t do it without you. President Trump is calling on his most LOYAL defenders to step up to the front lines of this nasty battle and DEFEND THE ELECTION. For a short time, you can even INCREASE your impact by 1000%. Please contribute $5 RIGHT NOW to the Official Election Defense Fund and to increase your impact by 1000%. >> CONTRIBUTE $20 = $220 CONTRIBUTE $15 = $165 CONTRIBUTE $10 = $110 CONTRIBUTE $5 = $55 CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT President Trump is fighting for you every single day. Can we tell him he can count on YOU to step up when he needs you most? Please contribute $5 TODAY to stand with your President and to increase your impact by 1000%. Thank you, Team Trump 2020 CONTRIBUTE $5 = $55 Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc., Save America, and the Republican National Committee.

subject: re: our card for Joe Biden and Kamala Harris
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
Hi Peter,
We just wanted to make sure you had a chance to sign our congratulations card for Joe Biden and Kamala Harris before we send it to their team!
[**Join Linda and hundreds of others in saying _congratulations_ to the next President and Vice President of the United States >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oH1nt5DBGiw-m6PuXqe__nrd3Bcz2tGdUt6pq0yesUo=/vc5rTCp2QO1M9Tlt_DUPJS6MWc9JkPPG63CHhM_sIw0=)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/oH1nt5DBGiw-m6PuXqe__nrd3Bcz2tGdUt6pq0yesUo=/DMjtlHgwwtqONF240NjleZaWq9l_MoIMFWLpe7rHz94=)
Read more in the forwarded message below ⬇️⬇️
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/oH1nt5DBGiw-m6PuXqe__nrd3Bcz2tGdUt6pq0yesUo=/oXnttWCaEPOmjVy5ujq8gaOst3CkqW5IyAAMSxMez_4=)
On Saturday, millions of Americans celebrated a long, hard-fought battle to retake the White House and set our country on a new trajectory.
Now, it's time we begin to heal our country -- but _first_ , I wanted to offer my heartfelt congratulations to the next President of the United States, Joe Biden, and our future _**Madam**_ Vice President, Kamala Harris.
[**Join me in saying _CONGRATULATIONS_ to _ _ Joe Biden and Kamala Harris for a race well run! | Sign Team Sanchez's card >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oH1nt5DBGiw-m6PuXqe__nrd3Bcz2tGdUt6pq0yesUo=/vc5rTCp2QO1M9Tlt_DUPJS6MWc9JkPPG63CHhM_sIw0=)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/oH1nt5DBGiw-m6PuXqe__nrd3Bcz2tGdUt6pq0yesUo=/DMjtlHgwwtqONF240NjleZaWq9l_MoIMFWLpe7rHz94=)
Campaigning is _hard -- _especially in a year like this when so much is on the line. I _know_ that Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are elated, exhausted, and ready to get to work for the American people.
For Joe and Kamala, however, this election is not the finish line. Instead, the real work starts **now**. With a _long_ road ahead of us, we need to celebrate victories as they come!
[**So, will you help us celebrate by signing our card of congratulations for President-elect Biden and Vice President-elect Harris?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oH1nt5DBGiw-m6PuXqe__nrd3Bcz2tGdUt6pq0yesUo=/vc5rTCp2QO1M9Tlt_DUPJS6MWc9JkPPG63CHhM_sIw0=)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/oH1nt5DBGiw-m6PuXqe__nrd3Bcz2tGdUt6pq0yesUo=/DMjtlHgwwtqONF240NjleZaWq9l_MoIMFWLpe7rHz94=)
Thank you!!
_\-- Linda S anchez_

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/oH1nt5DBGiw-m6PuXqe__nrd3Bcz2tGdUt6pq0yesUo=/Bo1tVbYGQXaD65td1c12wVqoORywQnysVXyx5bJO_Xg=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/oH1nt5DBGiw-m6PuXqe__nrd3Bcz2tGdUt6pq0yesUo=/ueAUDNxGqQDMiS0TvcW1Gdr7f1gZ3K9-TTPS-16lSdg=)_ _

body:
"I know what it is like to be cheated in an election and to be cheated by corrupt judges who drag on the election related cases... | | | Dear Friend,

We as Americans will always strive for what is right. We will fight for it, but the corrupt Democrats are going absolutely mad with anger right now. Let me explain.

After witnessing thousands upon thousands of voters across NJ being unable to cast their ballot in 2020 we have taken the fight for NJ all the way to the US Supreme Court. We have been officially docketed in the US Supreme Court and corrupt Phil Murphy has already been forced to respond. We are very confident, the US Supreme Court will rule in our favor. Joe Biden has no idea what is going on. [And he absolutely hates what we're doing right now.](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=412dd5c936&e=3e017fab0f)

We're not gonna let up the pressure. I need your support today and tomorrow to fund our ongoing battle in the US Supreme Court. [I hope you'll make a contribution today by clicking here](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=841f23cb5d&e=3e017fab0f) — whatever you give, we'll use to reclaim New Jersey... and America.

Take a look at my team's press release below for the full insider scoop on how we are fighting the Democrat Bosses harder than any candidate for office in decades. .

Cheers,
Hirsh

**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
Contact: [press@hirshsingh.com](mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release)

| |
# Singh Scorches NJDSC's Currie for Supporting Election Fraud

**LINWOOD, NJ** — The New Jersey Democratic State Committee and its Chairman John Currie want me to declare Joe Biden and Kamala Harris as the President-elect and Vice President-elect respectively. I have some news for them.

The counting process is a brazen attempt to steal the election from our President Donald Trump who was leading in the states of North Carolina, Georgia, Michigan, Wisconsin and Pennsylvania on election night. The numbers indicated that there was no way to catch him and we heard an announcement that counting had ceased in these states all at the same time. The next morning, to the utter disbelief of Americans, the numbers had been fraudulently adjusted to show Joe Biden in the lead. Pennsylvania has a law that imposes a deadline for the ballots to be received and the fake ballots that the Democrats brought in after the election should not be counted. Once they are discarded, President Trump will win the state. Recounts in Georgia, Michigan, and Wisconsin too will show that President Trump is the true winner. The Dominion software that has been used is an anti-American malware and the owners of the firm and facilitators of the fraud who used this software should be dealt with by law enforcement for launching a war against our great country.

I’m running for Governor to fix the election system.

I know what it is like to be cheated in an election and to be cheated by corrupt judges who drag on the election related cases with the aim of running out the clock. I was cheated in the Primary election by the establishment which got a Democrat plant to run against me and cheated to win the election. I have exposed various forms of cheating in my lawsuit currently before the US Supreme Court. It is surreal to watch President Trump go through exactly what I have gone through. It is wonderful to see President Trump not give up but fight the fraud. My lawsuit is also expected to help President Trump as a ruling in it invalidating the unconstitutional orders of Phil Murphy and throwing out the mail-in ballots for using the US Post Office to create new types of frauds will also impact President Trump's lawsuits nationwide.

I too have a message for John Currie: As part of the Democrat Party, you are part of a plantation that treats you like a slave. Joe Biden called you and all other black Americans as dirty and inarticulate when he claimed that Obama was the first clean and articulate black. Hillary Clinton claims that all black children are superpredators who need to be brought to heel. The Democrat Party is the party of the Ku Klux Klan. Right now, look at how they are stealing the election from John James, a US Senate Candidate, in Michigan. I urge you to quit it and walk away from it. We will welcome you into the Republican Party as long as you leave your Democrat values behind and embrace American values.

To all people who support President Trump and the fight to fix the election system here in New Jersey: Please sign up to follow our campaign you can also volunteer and donate at [hirshsingh.com](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=c2be20e1c6&e=3e017fab0f). Without your support, this fight is not possible.
---
| ###
For any inquiries, please reply to this message or send an email to: [press@hirshsingh.com](mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release)

Additional information is available on our [official website](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=122f562555&e=3e017fab0f) and [Facebook](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=428f73849e&e=3e017fab0f) page.

Thank you,
**The Singh for Governor Press Team**
_For the People_

name: Mary Mancini
subject: There Are No Off Years (A forward looking retrospective)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
Dear Peter

First, we want to say THANK YOU! We are incredibly proud and in awe of our Tennessee Democratic Party candidates, campaign staff, county parties, and volunteers, who all worked so hard over the past two years. Your unstoppable efforts during this unprecedented and difficult election year were nothing short of extraordinary and they have no doubt strengthened our Party, our state, and our democracy in immeasurable ways.

What we are seeing now is the democratic process in action and working. The American people picked Joe Biden and Kamala Harris to be their next president and vice president and we hope you are as elated as we are to have made history by electing the first Black woman as Vice President. We are also so excited to join with Joe Biden as he works to shed the divisiveness that has marked the last four years of the Trump presidency.

Joe Biden will unify this nation and, with steady, competent leadership, be the President to all Americans. He will put our health, lives, and livelihoods before all else and put us on the path to recovery with a plan to tackle this pandemic and build back our economy better than ever before.

2020 ELECTION RETROSPECTIVE
Tennessee had a record turnout rate this election (up from 35.97% in 2014, 61.92% in 2016 and 54.46% in 2018). Yet, despite the record turnout, Donald Trump did not increase his vote share from 2016. Statewide Democratic vote share for the first time since 20018 broke over one million!

2008 - 1,087,437
2010 - 529,851
2012 - 960,709
2014 - 309,237
2016 - 870,695
2018 - 985,450
2020 - 1,139,28

STATEWIDE RACES
Record voter turnout (68.6%) in Tennessee created an unpredictable environment. At the top of the ticket, Donald Trump only maintained the 60.7% of the vote he received in 2016. But President-Elect Joe Biden improved upon Secretary Clinton’s margins, 37.4% up from 34.7%. In the Senate race, Marquita Bradshaw ran slightly behind Vice President Biden with 35% of the vote.

CONGRESSIONAL RACES
The large and heavily gerrymandered congressional races outside of CD5 and CD9 largely mirrored the results from 2018.

STATE LEGISLATURE
FiveThirtyEight rates Tennessee’s state legislative districts as the third most Republican in the country (only ahead of South Dakota and Wyoming) and yet Tennessee Democrats flipped a seat with Donald Trump at the top of the ticket and held all incumbents and previous flips handily.

In fact, Tennessee is one of only ten states to make gains in the State Legislature in 2020. It is one of only two Southern states (alongside Georgia) to gain seats, and one of only three states Trump won (Utah and Texas) to gain seats.

MAKING HISTORY IN STATE LEG RACES
In the State Senate, Oak Hill Mayor Heidi Campbell flipped Senate District 20, previously held by Dr. Steve Dickerson. This represents the first time Tennessee Democrats have a seat in the State Senate since 1984. Additionally, even with Trump maintaining his vote share statewide, Democrats increased their vote shares in SD10 in Hamilton and Bradley Counties (+2.7% vs. 2016) and SD22 in Montgomery, Houston and Stewart Counties (+5% vs. 2016).

In the State House, Torrey Harris was elected in HD90 to replace John DeBerry who was removed from the Democratic ballot, ran as an independent and was supported by the Republican party. Torrey is also the first openly LGBTQ+ Democratic member to be elected to that position.

Some Democratic races overperformed their 2018 benchmarks – most notably HD97 in Shelby County (+4.8% vs. 2018), HD37 in Rutherford County (+1% vs. 2018) and HD83 in Shelby County (+2.8% vs 2018). Almost all House Districts showed movement towards the Democratic party from 2016, an indication that there have been real shifts in since 2016.

MAKING HISTORY IN LOCAL RACES
Tennessee Democrats continue to make gains and history in local races across the three Grand Divisions.

In Montgomery County, three of the seven newly elected members of the Clarksville City Council are African American, giving the City Council gender balance (six women and six men) and majority black representation for the first time.

In Blount County, long-time Democratic Party chair and activist, Sarah Herron, became the first woman ever to win a seat on the Maryville city council.

In Tipton County, Sonny Foster, a former police officer, became the first Black alderman in Brighton’s history.

This is just the tip of an increasingly blue iceberg, folks. Watch this space.

CONCLUSIONS
The 2020 environment nationwide was much more favorable to the Republican party than many expected. However, thanks to strong candidates and campaigns, smart investments, and collaboration between the TNDP and the House and Senate Caucuses, Tennessee Democrats were able to not only hold the line at the state legislature but continue to cut into the GOP supermajority in the Senate and win at the local level.

WHAT’S NEXT
There are no off years. 2021 is another big year for local elections. Democrats across the state know the importance of legislating at the local level and building a bench of savvy elected officials who share our values that every Tennessean - no matter who you are, what you look like, where you live, how you pray, or who you love - deserves the opportunity for a better life for you and your family.

If you are interested in turning Tennessee blue, contact your county election commission to find out what local elections are on your ballot in 2021. Then contact your local Democratic Party [https://tndp.org/county-parties-tennessee/] for more information.

JANUARY 2021 - TNDP CHAIR'S ELECTION
Lastly, as required by the governing bylaws of the Tennessee Democratic Party, the election for Tennessee Democratic Party chair will be scheduled for January 2021. I wanted to let you know that I will not be seeking re-election. It has been an honor of a lifetime to work with you and serve the Tennessee Democratic Party as chair for the last six years. I am excited to see what’s next for the Party and I look forward to helping the new chair in whatever capacity they need.

As always, please let me know what questions I can answer for you. Thank you for being a true blue member of the Tennessee Democratic Party.

Chair Mary Mancini & the TNDP Team

https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/oNKhpMgsTk-zA4pXE2fn4w2]

PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.

Tennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

In Blount County, long-time Democratic Party chair and activist, Sarah Herron, became the first woman ever to win a seat on the Maryville city council. In Tipton County, Sonny Foster, a former police officer, became the first Black alderman in Brighton’s history. This is just the tip of an increasingly blue iceberg, folks. Watch this space. CONCLUSIONS The 2020 environment nationwide was much more favorable to the Republican party than many expected. However, thanks to strong candidates and campaigns, smart investments, and collaboration between the TNDP and the House and Senate Caucuses, Tennessee Democrats were able to not only hold the line at the state legislature but continue to cut into the GOP supermajority in the Senate and win at the local level. WHAT’S NEXT There are no off years. 2021 is another big year for local elections. Democrats across the state know the importance of legislating at the local level and building a bench of savvy elected officials who share our values that every Tennessean - no matter who you are, what you look like, where you live, how you pray, or who you love - deserves the opportunity for a better life for you and your family. If you are interested in turning Tennessee blue, contact your county election commission to find out what local elections are on your ballot in 2021. Then contact your local Democratic Party [] for more information. JANUARY 2021 - TNDP CHAIR'S ELECTION Lastly, as required by the governing bylaws of the Tennessee Democratic Party, the election for Tennessee Democratic Party chair will be scheduled for January 2021. I wanted to let you know that I will not be seeking re-election. It has been an honor of a lifetime to work with you and serve the Tennessee Democratic Party as chair for the last six years. I am excited to see what’s next for the Party and I look forward to helping the new chair in whatever capacity they need. As always, please let me know what questions I can answer for you. Thank you for being a true blue member of the Tennessee Democratic Party. Chair Mary Mancini & the TNDP Team [] PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE. Tennessee Democratic Party 319 Plus Park Blvd Nashville, TN 37217 United States

We want to give our best supporters an update about the next steps as our race is still too close to call: Yesterday, we announced that our campaign will be filing for a complete recount in all 24 counties in IA-02 after citing numerous counting and other irregularities found over the past week. There's so much at stake in this election, and with such a slim margin, Iowans deserve to have confidence that their ballots have been accurately counted. Given the errors found in Jasper and Lucas counties, we are moving forward to ensure every voice is accurately counted. **[The importance of this recount can't be overstated. If you'd like to help us fund our recount efforts, please donate here.](https://act.myngp.com/el/oNIfkki-n7Wm0CQ3VcaejpO-Dk4GnWiA9alRlRyA4vc=/D90NVivAHRZGx3TM_0xM1x_aKkwlKgofml4e7h3G3kA=?refcode=201113-email)** Thanks so much for being on Team Hart. subject: IMPORTANT: every vote must count
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John James for Senate, Inc
body:
Elections must be free, fair, and honest [ ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d89152bc53fa41d78bff9011a0b98430&_e=HXbxDD6JO-nRfgn42jwH6dBFt52PpobNY6j71IN-JTDukRNfXxgpFh_mTY-n_HkQF7VJg3xjHrqTjihoWY4a4w6yaLZoI7-vhTUyvelisugBefTnb0GHCxLNz6-oT7imMB1qablQdr7Z667yWKRwzlwIYFFYWEygQcaeXPOuARnUH55BogGr5hW1MYtqbNITqQS5ibENPWNzr4q7mP20Eiu3g-Z5gIj6p2jY-GsxkKRl5kHIVDHl2vd47Eioq1IhIt1LnzTWHBHAITKe2NAqlgZnU-rrfMW3bdr9lMwmo5KMHblPNcQD1wdb2Ep0U4gBI2WQyJvTxVdyAca62GD_fcqxcaN1uapfdkypKSH1bHRBpUwdRfx52r-UU-nvPLP6yZ1o2SS4JaM50PdKp_VOcA%3D%3D) **Peter - I have an important announcement, and I need you to read this entire email.**
This is incredibly personal to me. I put my life on the line in Iraq to defend a fledgling democracy, and I flew missions to protect free and fair elections. I care deeply about the elections that take place in Michigan — my home, and where I am raising my children. This campaign is not about me, it never has been. It’s about making sure the People of Michigan have been heard loud and clear. Elections must be free, fair, and honest.
That is the principle at the foundation of our democracy, and the People of Michigan deserve to know for a fact that their vote has been counted. We must protect the integrity of our electoral process above all else — if we do not, our democracy will be in grave danger.
Voters _must_ have confidence that our elections have been conducted with integrity and that they were not disenfranchised.
Although Senator Peters is ahead, I have deep concerns that a sizable number of Michiganders may have been disenfranchised.
**That’s why I have asked my team to investigate and determine. I am 100% committed to making sure that every single legal vote is counted.**
**I’m emailing you right now to help me fund this fight for free and fair elections in Michigan — I need your help to make sure my team has the resources they need to make sure every valid ballot has been counted(you can donate here: [https://secure.winred.com/john-james-for-senate-inc/donate-1712512/)](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d89152bc53fa41d78bff9011a0b98430&_e=HXbxDD6JO-nRfgn42jwH6dBFt52PpobNY6j71IN-JTDukRNfXxgpFh_mTY-n_HkQF7VJg3xjHrqTjihoWY4a4w6yaLZoI7-vhTUyvelisugBefTnb0GHCxLNz6-oT7imMB1qablQdr7Z667yWKRwzlwIYFFYWEygQcaeXPOuARnUH55BogGr5hW1MYtqbNITBTulthMCRDIQTVtsolTNYptTeEEHEcEVXXRoj1EJss76LsytaAKuTGp56L107YfIyCAeOCX41wbs_0naEASRz6l8QlRvvYmnFVhDuv5_AWAxCjRR1h1TJwKeFsC6tlofrKqIKCcR6YaLUrfeZMQtVqcq8ucdtknQybUuaBD1bjRHsrQJ1rGs-he_iIA3xURjm4sSNzH4e2_NT7qz9QLjPA%3D%3D) **
**When the process is complete, I will, of course, accept the results and the will of the people. **
But right now, there are enough widely reported inconsistencies to warrant an investigation to ensure that elections were conducted in a transparent, legal, and fair manner. Those who object to this fair and legal process likely have something to hide.
If you want to help me ensure that the People of Michigan can trust democracy now and in the future, please help me get the resources to continue the fight.
**Donate here:[https://secure.winred.com/john-james-for-senate-inc/donate-1712512/](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d89152bc53fa41d78bff9011a0b98430&_e=HXbxDD6JO-nRfgn42jwH6dBFt52PpobNY6j71IN-JTDukRNfXxgpFh_mTY-n_HkQF7VJg3xjHrqTjihoWY4a4w6yaLZoI7-vhTUyvelisugBefTnb0GHCxLNz6-oT7imMB1qablQdr7Z667yWKRwzlwIYFFYWEygQcaeXPOuARnUH55BogGr5hW1MYtqbNITjEnOsuzrfDvJut0p7JgX2Kh42cTEltkPsBG6zIzUIuR3hMdTL-MnotWIi463BS4DpGQma6ULbdW9n8jAv8787p11F00d_tmDvilAYKUpVAiTrrVR3oiGFlwbamoQqlUNNXxki0-SsnrrJ_HniJQEmlkGB_Baen636tsFTgpfFgwLlRXjHD54xoqMrUbrY1vuOVHXKh-8xGBe-y0p6t04xw%3D%3D)**
Let’s Fly, John James |

clean_body: Elections must be free, fair, and honest Peter - I have an important announcement, and I need you to read this entire email. This is incredibly personal to me. I put my life on the line in Iraq to defend a fledgling democracy, and I flew missions to protect free and fair elections. I care deeply about the elections that take place in Michigan — my home, and where I am raising my children. This campaign is not about me, it never has been. It’s about making sure the People of Michigan have been heard loud and clear. Elections must be free, fair, and honest. That is the principle at the foundation of our democracy, and the People of Michigan deserve to know for a fact that their vote has been counted. We must protect the integrity of our electoral process above all else — if we do not, our democracy will be in grave danger. Voters must have confidence that our elections have been conducted with integrity and that they were not disenfranchised. Although Senator Peters is ahead, I have deep concerns that a sizable number of Michiganders may have been disenfranchised. That’s why I have asked my team to investigate and determine. I am 100% committed to making sure that every single legal vote is counted. I’m emailing you right now to help me fund this fight for free and fair elections in Michigan — I need your help to make sure my team has the resources they need to make sure every valid ballot has been counted(you can donate here: When the process is complete, I will, of course, accept the results and the will of the people. But right now, there are enough widely reported inconsistencies to warrant an investigation to ensure that elections were conducted in a transparent, legal, and fair manner. Those who object to this fair and legal process likely have something to hide. If you want to help me ensure that the People of Michigan can trust democracy now and in the future, please help me get the resources to continue the fight. Donate here: Let’s Fly, John James | | | | Paid for by the John James for Senate, Inc. | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | An individual may contribute up to $2,800 and Federal multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $5,000 towards post-election efforts. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to obtain and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle. name: Holcomb Crew
subject: ICYMI: Holcomb Makes Hoosier History
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
There’s a lot that is still up in the air about this year’s election, but one thing is certain. We made history in Indiana this year... | |
---
| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=377bb02dd89349aa956ac4e23e8d5c92&_e=Mvhmgzeh00Ejxrd0zvKfuUUam5Bjn99EBYAZnQNwIB9rxpgnT9Hl3v1roD8DIx60fgGeofT792-Pag6AU7EcboE0njI68tc3fvISMvGrRNz5OK_WUCt9n873tPFpSyEfE3yFipMUs8L2N2U5aWwlZSnwnOy905-3RxyRNgx_Ef5Zl8fDjj_9HdjdyPBYZPnfcfr41nh1yk1GlDPkI9yMvagkVSYFmbRQTyq8FqWhV2LW5UkIpmS2op4eFSTLzscCwwK7d9Yz8XywKe1EybCQ5EddlwFfNvQ7sXbSUqUg57HmlmsAUWgdnTJ4is_Ktj4J7mZnXOADrxq_3zawgL_I97DLiRN9FcSh4sH4OZ0X1lcAW-K8hOROnMJ4W9T5-q37-n6yeRBMHaUzi2Ltnbdb6wymtp9RDhAJN6Faf-ZLmaHqdKRuFD2kmw7JdALQUzACTd39ZlsPMyOSUawUncM-CPt7CPPICwicbOlF_k3WhOU%3D) |
---|---|---
|
---
Friend,

There’s a lot that is still up in the air about this year’s election, but one thing is certain.

_We made history in Indiana this year, friend. _

Our campaign shattered some of the most important electoral records in Indiana — **including getting the most votes for governor in the history of the state.**

**Governor Holcomb also won with the second-highest margin of victory ever recorded. **

It was incredible to be a part of a history-making campaign like this one, and it’s all thanks to the hard work of Hoosiers like you. We could not have done this without you, and we couldn’t be more grateful for your time, donations, and, of course, your vote.

**But we’re just getting started, friend.**

The next four years are going to be all about building One Indiana for All, and we’ll be honest — it’s going to take a lot of hard work, and we’re going to need your help.

One of the things that we’ll be counting on you for over the next four years is your input — we need to know what issues are most important to you, and what you want our administration to focus on.

Friend, will you let us know what your priorities are over the next four years? Fill out our comment box below.
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=377bb02dd89349aa956ac4e23e8d5c92&_e=Mvhmgzeh00Ejxrd0zvKfuUUam5Bjn99EBYAZnQNwIB9rxpgnT9Hl3v1roD8DIx60fgGeofT792-Pag6AU7EcboE0njI68tc3fvISMvGrRNz5OK_WUCt9n873tPFpSyEfE3yFipMUs8L2N2U5aWwlZSnwnOy905-3RxyRNgx_Ef5Zl8fDjj_9HdjdyPBYZPnfcfr41nh1yk1GlDPkI9yMvagkVSYFmbRQTyq8FqWhV2LW5UkIpmS2op4eFSTLzscCwwK7d9Yz8XywKe1EybCQ5Fzo7UXeaqbdd-a6PVGIJOCIVkiQervxaquObg-NLZMFLNG4Ny0efkakyE7wBfHaATUVKXb-4EgjtNIWn5yu6DBSVxKTvqDi1UUAup3mn2NHzChNTLFX6D0DDpyHt8_dS8YWA4KB99fJluJBUNVaRNypDgwcKgE5w8Lr_eY7K3Aa-CQQqMWHARA5oRd_6eTQkdH_w3j_L0mlq_nGc0_2IIo%3D)
Thank you for your support, and your input.

Sincerely,

Holcomb Crew
---

body:
Look, I get it. You probably have election fatigue, but I know you care deeply about the future of our country, so I promise I will be brief.
Look, I get it. You probably have election fatigue, but I know you care deeply about the future of our country, so I promise I will be brief.

The Senate Majority will be decided by two Georgia runoff elections and the Republicans are being outraised by MILLIONS.

Friend,
We told you yesterday that Democrats are fighting us at every turn, and now, **we learned that seats in states like Georgia, Pennsylvania, Florida, Kansas, Montana, and New Hampshire are still vulnerable.**
It's critical that State Republicans are prepared for anything Democrats throw at us.
We've set a goal of reaching 15,000 donations by the end of the week to help prepare in case State Republicans have to go on the defense. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
We are the only organization solely focused on electing Republicans to down-ballot, state-level offices. We accomplish this by working directly with Republican leadership in the states and providing them with resources, training, and funding. We have nearly 200,000 donors in all 50 states. The RSLC invested a record $45 million into state-level races in the 2017-2018 election cycle, which contributed to state-level Republicans maintaining 61 of 99 legislative chamber majorities, holding 25 lieutenant governor seats, and 29 secretaries of state offices. Your support is critical to making this happen. You can learn more about us at RSLC.GOP.

name: Marco Rubio
subject: 70% of Republicans Agree
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Friend,
_America 's freedom and democracy are centered around one constant: free and fair elections. If we lose confidence in our election process we will lose everything._
Despite what the media and those on the radical left want you to believe, it is not their place to declare the winner of a Presidential election when it has not yet been made official. Our country has processes and laws for close elections. They allow candidates the right to contest votes potentially cast in violation of the law. They allow the right to present potential evidence of fraud or misconduct in a court of law. All of which is well within our country's election laws and all of which has been used by both parties in past races.
**What 's inexcusable is the bias from the liberal media.**
For the past _FOUR YEARS_ the radical left and their media lackeys said Russia determined the outcome in 2016, supported Democrats when they went to court over the 2018 gubernatorial race in Georgia and _**TO THIS DAY** _claim that race was illegitimate.
_**The liberal media was appalled and disgusted by the 'dangers' of Trump rallies, but now applaud parties and celebrations in the streets because they support Joe Biden?**_ It's sickening and no surprise that 70% of Republicans are not confident in the outcome of this election.
[_**Will you stand with us against the bias of liberal media?**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f11K4j93vv_NhJ64cbZP1I4w1TruQL19Cw0UKkqjriGcn1sOAN9kYCCuo0_PgYTtxopi24gJmw9g37AhSd7ZSYAsQCJrEROX_WgvRG9hctbpHHwWqkfAGf6bAMIqIfrQp8ZQzBhCDCHqunLTzFYAtTR8hCCq19jvf-7O6kNmyBM9lqxIBTqk4c_tonYv8n66iM0yWIxRBjPc9lCXO1TqQXKhmhzJ-kxXhtlk_OcjjajSgYKhnMn9_2QR5L2KM7U6VZE3ZIel_QYWi12Rqt2eVK7cZoIKZOVQk522N6ASkm2rmaiFSAHr3DXr7is-k-8HrPWeWuvAteLcMgzjaIGYgLSGag7ZrcTtH-f-KgQQuLQyWetk6BfcvrhpwktMz_KW8hE-X4JnHJOkryhE_MnmWc84-BfuMNLLfj1wm1f24RVQgaLvP6JzVfUAmHfQwnW1&c=jcvPMrWZkVQKMEw4QtqFHbXaZVvfgGzlbDR2xmuTzq_1S96iKtQM2w==&ch=8CUKr0mY8JXUQ-XoOQhGv0wE5msU_LwT1sursxbXAVrSkupOCyragA==) We can't allow their personal political opinions to stand in the way of our democracy any longer. That's why we're garnering support to stand **_AGAINST_** their liberal media bias and call for them to stay _**OUT**_ of the election process.
[_**STAND AGAINST THE LIBERAL MEDIA BIAS >>> ADD YOUR NAME**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f11K4j93vv_NhJ64cbZP1I4w1TruQL19Cw0UKkqjriGcn1sOAN9kYCCuo0_PgYTtxopi24gJmw9g37AhSd7ZSYAsQCJrEROX_WgvRG9hctbpHHwWqkfAGf6bAMIqIfrQp8ZQzBhCDCHqunLTzFYAtTR8hCCq19jvf-7O6kNmyBM9lqxIBTqk4c_tonYv8n66iM0yWIxRBjPc9lCXO1TqQXKhmhzJ-kxXhtlk_OcjjajSgYKhnMn9_2QR5L2KM7U6VZE3ZIel_QYWi12Rqt2eVK7cZoIKZOVQk522N6ASkm2rmaiFSAHr3DXr7is-k-8HrPWeWuvAteLcMgzjaIGYgLSGag7ZrcTtH-f-KgQQuLQyWetk6BfcvrhpwktMz_KW8hE-X4JnHJOkryhE_MnmWc84-BfuMNLLfj1wm1f24RVQgaLvP6JzVfUAmHfQwnW1&c=jcvPMrWZkVQKMEw4QtqFHbXaZVvfgGzlbDR2xmuTzq_1S96iKtQM2w==&ch=8CUKr0mY8JXUQ-XoOQhGv0wE5msU_LwT1sursxbXAVrSkupOCyragA==)
The fate of our elections lies solely within the hands of the American people. It seems as though the media has forgotten that. [**Add your name and help remind those in the media that there is a fair and democratic election process that DOES NOT involve their bias or insight.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f11K4j93vv_NhJ64cbZP1I4w1TruQL19Cw0UKkqjriGcn1sOAN9kYCCuo0_PgYTtxopi24gJmw9g37AhSd7ZSYAsQCJrEROX_WgvRG9hctbpHHwWqkfAGf6bAMIqIfrQp8ZQzBhCDCHqunLTzFYAtTR8hCCq19jvf-7O6kNmyBM9lqxIBTqk4c_tonYv8n66iM0yWIxRBjPc9lCXO1TqQXKhmhzJ-kxXhtlk_OcjjajSgYKhnMn9_2QR5L2KM7U6VZE3ZIel_QYWi12Rqt2eVK7cZoIKZOVQk522N6ASkm2rmaiFSAHr3DXr7is-k-8HrPWeWuvAteLcMgzjaIGYgLSGag7ZrcTtH-f-KgQQuLQyWetk6BfcvrhpwktMz_KW8hE-X4JnHJOkryhE_MnmWc84-BfuMNLLfj1wm1f24RVQgaLvP6JzVfUAmHfQwnW1&c=jcvPMrWZkVQKMEw4QtqFHbXaZVvfgGzlbDR2xmuTzq_1S96iKtQM2w==&ch=8CUKr0mY8JXUQ-XoOQhGv0wE5msU_LwT1sursxbXAVrSkupOCyragA==)
Stand with us today and send a message to the liberal media that are eager to interject in our free and fair elections.
[_**STAND AGAINST THE LIBERAL MEDIA BIAS >>> ADD YOUR NAME**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001f11K4j93vv_NhJ64cbZP1I4w1TruQL19Cw0UKkqjriGcn1sOAN9kYCCuo0_PgYTtxopi24gJmw9g37AhSd7ZSYAsQCJrEROX_WgvRG9hctbpHHwWqkfAGf6bAMIqIfrQp8ZQzBhCDCHqunLTzFYAtTR8hCCq19jvf-7O6kNmyBM9lqxIBTqk4c_tonYv8n66iM0yWIxRBjPc9lCXO1TqQXKhmhzJ-kxXhtlk_OcjjajSgYKhnMn9_2QR5L2KM7U6VZE3ZIel_QYWi12Rqt2eVK7cZoIKZOVQk522N6ASkm2rmaiFSAHr3DXr7is-k-8HrPWeWuvAteLcMgzjaIGYgLSGag7ZrcTtH-f-KgQQuLQyWetk6BfcvrhpwktMz_KW8hE-X4JnHJOkryhE_MnmWc84-BfuMNLLfj1wm1f24RVQgaLvP6JzVfUAmHfQwnW1&c=jcvPMrWZkVQKMEw4QtqFHbXaZVvfgGzlbDR2xmuTzq_1S96iKtQM2w==&ch=8CUKr0mY8JXUQ-XoOQhGv0wE5msU_LwT1sursxbXAVrSkupOCyragA==)

clean_body: Friend, America 's freedom and democracy are centered around one constant: free and fair elections. If we lose confidence in our election process we will lose everything. Despite what the media and those on the radical left want you to believe, it is not their place to declare the winner of a Presidential election when it has not yet been made official. Our country has processes and laws for close elections. They allow candidates the right to contest votes potentially cast in violation of the law. They allow the right to present potential evidence of fraud or misconduct in a court of law. All of which is well within our country's election laws and all of which has been used by both parties in past races. What 's inexcusable is the bias from the liberal media. For the past FOUR YEARS the radical left and their media lackeys said Russia determined the outcome in 2016, supported Democrats when they went to court over the 2018 gubernatorial race in Georgia and TO THIS DAY claim that race was illegitimate. The liberal media was appalled and disgusted by the 'dangers' of Trump rallies, but now applaud parties and celebrations in the streets because they support Joe Biden? It's sickening and no surprise that 70% of Republicans are not confident in the outcome of this election. == We can't allow their personal political opinions to stand in the way of our democracy any longer. That's why we're garnering support to stand AGAINST their liberal media bias and call for them to stay OUT of the election process. == The fate of our elections lies solely within the hands of the American people. It seems as though the media has forgotten that. == Stand with us today and send a message to the liberal media that are eager to interject in our free and fair elections. == Best, Team Marco == Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate P.O. Box 661537 Miami, FL 33266 == | | Marco Rubio for Senate | PO Box 661537, Miami, FL 33266 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

body:
We’re excited to announce that we’ve extended the Staff Academy application deadline
| | | | |
---
| | | | Peter — HUGE news:
We’ve extended the Staff Academy 2021 Cohort application deadline through 11:59 pm ET on Sunday, November 22nd!
We get it — There’s A LOT going on in the world right now, and because of that we know some folks might need a little bit more time to get their application in.
That’s why we’ve decided to give everyone an extra seven days (!!!) to complete the process.
So, take a deep breath and make a plan to get your application in before the NEW deadline on November 22nd!
Here’s the best link for you to apply: [https://traindemocrats.org/staff-academy/staff-academy-application/](https://t.dripemail2.)

name: John James
subject: UPDATE: elections must be fair and honest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John James for Senate, Inc
body:
That is the principle at the foundation of our democracy, and the People of Michigan deserve to know for a fact that their vote has been counted — not [ ](http://links.makingagreateramerica.com/u/click?_t=61da4500de824401a8b93478db1cc37b&_m=558d25ca9f6a401da594d052b45e9edf&_e=pkWqA8SgYirUv48d4K6yYKM7ViK1gjq6tDGmrERcFB9E2A8_4G7ovmoqM-_DN9c_Fogk526BKMMngYG_Y50iObs7El4hCc5E3yj-yG88iMoiXkDMg7oWUyX5woZrDHnW-mtXT1fV-bXEnJPrKHS3jSPWGRhM0YeL_8X2q3trIoTCG1aD5p1bZwYsGybC3COV_0JruWfJAYYW8jM6dGxaU5iovUo20y5lFhHSpvIx5qsxHQSU9UgIX5qm2Jxd43QBAj-3-BVxpHTgYBdGLaAt9arELWe2oNnhu7e6Q06b9i0lNVCqsE9U6P0E5Knu4fmGaMyit_ogmfTEF43jP1Z-mIoYKdR7452qHPjn3SPO2Z9IcAflZGF50Yh4BFaVoR83opGOinvycTpq-AKnq-MICQ%3D%3D) **Peter - I have an important announcement, and I need you to read this entire email.**
This is incredibly personal to me. I put my life on the line in Iraq to defend a fledgling democracy, and I flew missions to protect free and fair elections. I care deeply about the elections that take place in Michigan — my home, and where I am raising my children. This campaign is not about me, it never has been. It’s about making sure the People of Michigan have been heard loud and clear. Elections must be free, fair, and honest.
That is the principle at the foundation of our democracy, and the People of Michigan deserve to know for a fact that their vote has been counted. We must protect the integrity of our electoral process above all else — if we do not, our democracy will be in grave danger.
Voters _must_ have confidence that our elections have been conducted with integrity and that they were not disenfranchised.
Although Senator Peters is ahead, I have deep concerns that a sizable number of Michiganders may have been disenfranchised.
**That’s why I have asked my team to investigate and determine. I am 100% committed to making sure that every single legal vote is counted.**
**I’m emailing you right now to help me fund this fight for free and fair elections in Michigan — I need your help to make sure my team has the resources they need to make sure every valid ballot has been counted(you can donate here: [https://secure.winred.com/john-james-for-senate-inc/donate-1712512/)](http://links.makingagreateramerica.com/u/click?_t=61da4500de824401a8b93478db1cc37b&_m=558d25ca9f6a401da594d052b45e9edf&_e=pkWqA8SgYirUv48d4K6yYKM7ViK1gjq6tDGmrERcFB9E2A8_4G7ovmoqM-_DN9c_Fogk526BKMMngYG_Y50iObs7El4hCc5E3yj-yG88iMoiXkDMg7oWUyX5woZrDHnW-mtXT1fV-bXEnJPrKHS3jSPWGRhM0YeL_8X2q3trIoTCG1aD5p1bZwYsGybC3COVxL3_CuEpRBTCAFjnZOzmm2Li6JThZrJE1chGiOk6dk4VD3Vl2CSd7C17LmCQeFJb8WLLQQMpHhcghcYKbfWgVw1FHe1ekCSjpU1A6ZsG8vTjle1xrllLi4x6nAg-751xcACjOAiHX-sr9EJH5ylPTQ6shg3Tm2tpxU_4JvZ1MZEvlMaEFRGwyKqYk2esnyRqcHAt5i8NWOccQ9bebjB-9Q%3D%3D) **
**When the process is complete, I will, of course, accept the results and the will of the people. **
But right now, there are enough widely reported inconsistencies to warrant an investigation to ensure that elections were conducted in a transparent, legal, and fair manner. Those who object to this fair and legal process likely have something to hide.
If you want to help me ensure that the People of Michigan can trust democracy now and in the future, please help me get the resources to continue the fight.
**Donate here:[https://secure.winred.com/john-james-for-senate-inc/donate-1712512/](http://links.makingagreateramerica.com/u/click?_t=61da4500de824401a8b93478db1cc37b&_m=558d25ca9f6a401da594d052b45e9edf&_e=pkWqA8SgYirUv48d4K6yYKM7ViK1gjq6tDGmrERcFB9E2A8_4G7ovmoqM-_DN9c_Fogk526BKMMngYG_Y50iObs7El4hCc5E3yj-yG88iMoiXkDMg7oWUyX5woZrDHnW-mtXT1fV-bXEnJPrKHS3jSPWGRhM0YeL_8X2q3trIoTCG1aD5p1bZwYsGybC3COVf6WrGVx4EpQVPRwjifloz7U3KLnfKy_R7WbxFooF8yB6j39mo2yCZjWx6qnbNhlenovrJ5gWu509TjLvRjqaJtaUgIBTn7-DO2_Wh85cE7zN3A6yX4Dnr3cFuBKbKO2_sFt0zuJmxDdq2j4MtPRa1qjMdKvlYbhyAadXteLbGn7n62Ysur2vBMXuscPh4AbRM12kYAd2MRMIBQSmf-7u_A%3D%3D)**
Let’s Fly, John James |

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://email
body:
# [#]
Peter,

Congratulations to Joe Biden and Kamala Harris for being elected to be our next President and Vice President of the United States!

This win could not have been possible without all of your time and dedication. Thank you for your hard work. You came together, worked hard, and made this happen.

Now, we can begin to come together to not only heal as a nation, but also to tackle the many challenges we are facing. From crushing the coronavirus to boosting the economy and combatting climate change, we have much more work to be done. But I know that together, we can make much-needed progress on these and many other issues confronting our country.

Thank you again for your continued support,

Mike Thompson

name: Jeff Davis, General Consultant
subject: If you believe in fair elections, click here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim 2020 Committee
body:
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/ff47d117b77d4ecc/954c1c253fdfeb29c3d6b838967d376c/34533) Peter, We are looking for volunteers for Jim to help with our efforts to rehabilitate thousands of GOP mail-in ballots that have been rejected.
Rehabilitating ballots is the process that gives people a chance to sign an affidavit that their ballot should be counted after it was disqualified for a technicality.
With so many mail-in ballots this year, many voters weren’t able to ask poll workers questions about how to fill in their ballot. Even something like printed name rather than a cursive signature could “disqualify” a ballot!
**We need volunteers to help us reach out to these thousands of GOP voters who have had their ballots disqualified so we can get them to sign an affidavit so their vote will be counted!**
**We need to mobilize volunteers, AND notaries (If you are a notary, or know a notary, we need you!)**
If you have any spare time, we need your help NOW to make sure this is a fair election. [VOLUNTEER NOW >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/ff47d117b77d4ecc/fb40b195f075c248c3d6b838967d376c/34533) The left is desperate to win this for Lauren Underwood, and they’ll stop at nothing to throw out as many GOP ballots as they can. But we can fight back and make sure they are fairly counted.
Let’s be clear, there are more rejected ballots outstanding than votes that separate us in this race – This effort will help secure our victory.
But we can’t do it without your help. Please help us bring this home for Jim by volunteering today!
For the win,
Jeff Davis, General Consultant PS: Under the law EVERY affidavit needs to be signed in front of a notary, we need dozens, if not hundreds of notaries to help us. | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/ff47d117b77d4ecc/c36462c9d258466ec3d6b838967d376c/34533)

clean_body: Peter, We are looking for volunteers for Jim to help with our efforts to rehabilitate thousands of GOP mail-in ballots that have been rejected. Rehabilitating ballots is the process that gives people a chance to sign an affidavit that their ballot should be counted after it was disqualified for a technicality. With so many mail-in ballots this year, many voters weren’t able to ask poll workers questions about how to fill in their ballot. Even something like printed name rather than a cursive signature could “disqualify” a ballot! We need volunteers to help us reach out to these thousands of GOP voters who have had their ballots disqualified so we can get them to sign an affidavit so their vote will be counted! We need to mobilize volunteers, AND notaries (If you are a notary, or know a notary, we need you!) If you have any spare time, we need your help NOW to make sure this is a fair election. The left is desperate to win this for Lauren Underwood, and they’ll stop at nothing to throw out as many GOP ballots as they can. But we can fight back and make sure they are fairly counted. Let’s be clear, there are more rejected ballots outstanding than votes that separate us in this race – This effort will help secure our victory. But we can’t do it without your help. Please help us bring this home for Jim by volunteering today! For the win, Jeff Davis, General Consultant PS: Under the law EVERY affidavit needs to be signed in front of a notary, we need dozens, if not hundreds of notaries to help us. | | id:2020-11-03-14:34:52:515t Paid for by Jim 2020 Committee

body:
**[Web version](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b20318-af0ea235aa174d5aa436f154143a78d3/74/800/f71c900a-ca48-4695-8e47-b4f43d34d93f)** More than a full week has come and gone after Election Day and we still do not know who the next President of the United States will be. Mainstream Media outlets have called the race for Joe Biden, even though it is not the media that decide and names the next President in our Constitutional Republic. While the media work overtime to force their narrative on the nation that Joe Biden has already won, President Trump’s legal team has filed numerous lawsuits alleging there was substantial voter fraud in key swing states. These allegations are headed to courts of law in various states, along with other states announcing official recounts. President Trump has the legal and moral right to challenge results, and it is supremely unethical for the media and others to push the claim that Joe Biden has won. Bottom line? **This race is far from over and[the President still has a shot](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzE4LWFmMGVhMjM1YWExNzRkNWFhNDM2ZjE1NDE0M2E3OGQz%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9pc3N1ZXNpbnNpZ2h0cy5jb20vMjAyMC8xMS8xMi9sb29rLWNsb3NlbHktdHJ1bXAtc3RpbGwtaGFzLWEtZ29vZC1zaG90LWF0LXdpbm5pbmctcmVlbGVjdGlvbi8_bWlkPTQyOTcxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=rwRh2m-YgZdX-mi4Hs1zwg) at winning re-election.** [ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzE4LWFmMGVhMjM1YWExNzRkNWFhNDM2ZjE1NDE0M2E3OGQz%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9pc3N1ZXNpbnNpZ2h0cy5jb20vMjAyMC8xMS8xMi9sb29rLWNsb3NlbHktdHJ1bXAtc3RpbGwtaGFzLWEtZ29vZC1zaG90LWF0LXdpbm5pbmctcmVlbGVjdGlvbi8_bWlkPTQyOTcxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=afexF2AzsiTuOq3pyHGGTQ) **[Look Closely: Trump Still Has A Shot At Winning Reelection](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzE4LWFmMGVhMjM1YWExNzRkNWFhNDM2ZjE1NDE0M2E3OGQz%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9pc3N1ZXNpbnNpZ2h0cy5jb20vMjAyMC8xMS8xMi9sb29rLWNsb3NlbHktdHJ1bXAtc3RpbGwtaGFzLWEtZ29vZC1zaG90LWF0LXdpbm5pbmctcmVlbGVjdGlvbi8_bWlkPTQyOTcxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=OQmE5TkpLK6VtqpvEUM72w)**

The presidential race isn’t the only election too close to call, in fact 2 key Senate seats in Georgia are both headed for runoff elections, following election day totals.

The GOP retaining both seats in Georgia is VITAL to ensuring radical “progressive” policies don’t become the law of our land.

We MUST hold the line in Georgia in two ways. One is to hold these two GOP Senate seats.

Second is to help with the recount/audit as a volunteer. On this front, we have already begun mobilizing to #ProtectTheVote in Georgia and we need your help!

_To those who’ve served our country honorably,_

_To those who’ve sacrificed for our freedom,_

_To those who’ve paid the ultimate price,_

_We, at Tea Party Patriots, want to thank you._

Your service and sacrifice are what allows our great American experiment in self-governance to continue. And while Veterans Day is extremely important, we think that every day should be like Veterans Day. Every day should be a day where we honor and thank those who have served our great nation. Your contribution to the preservation of freedom, liberty and justice for all will NEVER be forgotten!

clean_body: More than a full week has come and gone after Election Day and we still do not know who the next President of the United States will be. Mainstream Media outlets have called the race for Joe Biden, even though it is not the media that decide and names the next President in our Constitutional Republic. While the media work overtime to force their narrative on the nation that Joe Biden has already won, President Trump’s legal team has filed numerous lawsuits alleging there was substantial voter fraud in key swing states. These allegations are headed to courts of law in various states, along with other states announcing official recounts. President Trump has the legal and moral right to challenge results, and it is supremely unethical for the media and others to push the claim that Joe Biden has won. Bottom line? This race is far from over and at winning re-election. The Biden/Harris team and their complicit allies in the mainstream news industry are attempting one of the most audacious heists in American political history. | | The presidential race isn’t the only election too close to call, in fact 2 key Senate seats in Georgia are both headed for runoff elections, following election day totals. The GOP retaining both seats in Georgia is VITAL to ensuring radical “progressive” policies don’t become the law of our land. We MUST hold the line in Georgia in two ways. One is to hold these two GOP Senate seats. Second is to help with the recount/audit as a volunteer. On this front, we have already begun mobilizing to #ProtectTheVote in Georgia and we need your help! | Rep. Doug Collins, head of President Donald Trump’s Georgia recount team and Georgia GOP Chairman David Shafer identified several issues with the hand recount directive issued in the Peach State... | To those who’ve served our country honorably, To those who’ve sacrificed for our freedom, To those who’ve paid the ultimate price, We, at Tea Party Patriots, want to thank you. Your service and sacrifice are what allows our great American experiment in self-governance to continue. And while Veterans Day is extremely important, we think that every day should be like Veterans Day. Every day should be a day where we honor and thank those who have served our great nation. Your contribution to the preservation of freedom, liberty and justice for all will NEVER be forgotten! | President Donald Trump said he was confident he will get to 270 electoral votes and win the election in a Thursday interview with the Washington Examiner’s Bryon York. | For those of you near Washington, DC or who can make it there tomorrow morning, the rally will start at Freedom Plaza at noon. We should note that this is not a Tea Party Patriots event. We have been all-in on making sure the Georgia recount is transparent and fair to ensure that people can have faith in the process. However, we have been doing what we can to help promote this event and encourage you to attend if you are able. President Trump even tweeted about it today! | On Saturday, tens of thousands of people teemed throughout the streets of New York City to celebrate Joe Biden’s apparent election victory. | 400 years ago, the Pilgrims landed on America’s shores and signed the Mayflower Compact, establishing a government “by the people, for the people.” Now, 400 years later, that system of government could be in jeopardy... Nov. 11, 2020, marks the 400th anniversary since the Pilgrims arrived at Cape Cod, Massachusetts, and signed the Mayflower Compact. | New York Gov. Andrew Cuomo on Wednesday ordered his state’s citizens to limit gatherings at private residences just two weeks before Thanksgiving. | |

Women Speak Out PAC (WSO PAC) is a nonconnected independent expenditure-only political committee (i.e., a federal "Super PAC") that is registered with the Federal Election Commission and is exempt from federal taxation under section 527 of the Internal Revenue Code. WSO PAC may accept unlimited contributions from any source, including individuals, political committees, and corporations, but may not accept contributions from federal contractors or foreign nationals (except individuals who are not citizens of the United States but who are lawfully admitted for permanent residence). Federal law requires WSO PAC to use its best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose contribution(s) exceed $200 in a calendar year. That 's why we just launched a $4 million independent expenditure campaign to re-elect pro-life Senators Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue. Our multi-channel effort will include voter mail, digital ads, voter calls and texts, and door-to-door canvassing. Right now, pro-life Americans are fired-up like never before and want to take action to ensure we have every check in place in the event that Joe Biden and Kamala Harris enter the Oval Office. Without a pro-life Republican majority in the Senate, the Big Abortion Lobby would get away with passing the most anti-life agenda in American history and take extreme measures like adding a tenth justice to the Supreme Court to make their deadly agenda permanent. You are our only hope of stopping them at this critical moment. Thank you and God bless, Margaret Iuculano Chief Development Officer Women Speak Out PAC PAID FOR BY WOMEN SPEAK OUT PAC. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. Women Speak Out PAC (WSO PAC) is a nonconnected independent expenditure-only political committee (i.e., a federal "Super PAC") that is registered with the Federal Election Commission and is exempt from federal taxation under section 527 of the Internal Revenue Code. WSO PAC's spending is independent; it does not make contributions to, or coordinate its spending with, any candidates or political parties. WSO PAC may accept unlimited contributions from any source, including individuals, political committees, and corporations, but may not accept contributions from federal contractors or foreign nationals (except individuals who are not citizens of the United States but who are lawfully admitted for permanent residence). Federal law requires WSO PAC to use its best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose contribution(s) exceed $200 in a calendar year. The IRS does not allow contributions to WSO PAC to be deducted as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

You might think the 2020 Election is over... Think again. As tumultuous as it has been, we are far from over. A lot is up in the air. Two of.... Peter, You might think the 2020 Election is over...
Think again.
As tumultuous as it has been, we are far from over.
A lot is up in the air. Two of my Senate colleagues from Georgia will be heading to runoff elections which could cancel out our GOP majority. Control of the Senate hangs in the balance. The radical left will continue to pour dark money into their states to chip away at our majority.
They’re not going to stop until they take back this majority, Peter.
That’s why I’m coming to you for help.
You’ve proven yourself to be a reliable GOP supporter time and time again... I’m coming to you today to stress that your job is not done. There are still Republicans in great need of help.
In the coming months, I’m going to do everything I can to defend our majority, but I need YOU to help me with that. **[Will you chip in $25 now to help fight all of our new battles to keep the Senate Please send a personal check made payable to “Elect Republicans” to the address above to contribute by mail. Be sure to provide your full name, mailing address, email address, occupation, and employer with your mailed contribution.

Contributions to Elect Republicans are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes and will be used in connection with federal elections.

Federal law requires Elect Republicans to use its best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year.

subject: Singh Scorches NJDSC's Currie for supporting Election Fraud
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SINGH FOR SENATE
body:
"I know what it is like to be cheated in an election and to be cheated by corrupt judges who drag on the election related cases... | | | Dear Friend,

We as Americans will always strive for what is right. We will fight for it, but the corrupt Democrats are going absolutely mad with anger right now. Let me explain.

After witnessing thousands upon thousands of voters across NJ being unable to cast their ballot in 2020 we have taken the fight for NJ all the way to the US Supreme Court. We have been officially docketed in the US Supreme Court and corrupt Phil Murphy has already been forced to respond. We are very confident, the US Supreme Court will rule in our favor. Joe Biden has no idea what is going on. [And he absolutely hates what we're doing right now.](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=5bb5ab0614&e=3e017fab0f)

We're not gonna let up the pressure. I need your support today and tomorrow to fund our ongoing battle in the US Supreme Court. [I hope you'll make a contribution today by clicking here](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=9eba529032&e=3e017fab0f) — whatever you give, we'll use to reclaim New Jersey... and America.

Take a look at my team's press release below for the full insider scoop on how we are fighting the Democrat Bosses harder than any candidate for office in decades. .

Cheers,
Hirsh
---
| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=2898fdfbe9&e=3e017fab0f)
---
|
---
| November 12th, 2020
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
Contact: [press@hirshsingh.com](mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release)
---
| |
# Singh Scorches NJDSC's Currie for Supporting Election Fraud

**LINWOOD, NJ** — The New Jersey Democratic State Committee and its Chairman John Currie want me to declare Joe Biden and Kamala Harris as the President-elect and Vice President-elect respectively. I have some news for them.

The counting process is a brazen attempt to steal the election from our President Donald Trump who was leading in the states of North Carolina, Georgia, Michigan, Wisconsin and Pennsylvania on election night. The numbers indicated that there was no way to catch him and we heard an announcement that counting had ceased in these states all at the same time. The next morning, to the utter disbelief of Americans, the numbers had been fraudulently adjusted to show Joe Biden in the lead. Pennsylvania has a law that imposes a deadline for the ballots to be received and the fake ballots that the Democrats brought in after the election should not be counted. Once they are discarded, President Trump will win the state. Recounts in Georgia, Michigan, and Wisconsin too will show that President Trump is the true winner. The Dominion software that has been used is an anti-American malware and the owners of the firm and facilitators of the fraud who used this software should be dealt with by law enforcement for launching a war against our great country.

I’m running for Governor to fix the election system.

I know what it is like to be cheated in an election and to be cheated by corrupt judges who drag on the election related cases with the aim of running out the clock. I was cheated in the Primary election by the establishment which got a Democrat plant to run against me and cheated to win the election. I have exposed various forms of cheating in my lawsuit currently before the US Supreme Court. It is surreal to watch President Trump go through exactly what I have gone through. It is wonderful to see President Trump not give up but fight the fraud. My lawsuit is also expected to help President Trump as a ruling in it invalidating the unconstitutional orders of Phil Murphy and throwing out the mail-in ballots for using the US Post Office to create new types of frauds will also impact President Trump's lawsuits nationwide.

I too have a message for John Currie: As part of the Democrat Party, you are part of a plantation that treats you like a slave. Joe Biden called you and all other black Americans as dirty and inarticulate when he claimed that Obama was the first clean and articulate black. Hillary Clinton claims that all black children are superpredators who need to be brought to heel. The Democrat Party is the party of the Ku Klux Klan. Right now, look at how they are stealing the election from John James, a US Senate Candidate, in Michigan. I urge you to quit it and walk away from it. We will welcome you into the Republican Party as long as you leave your Democrat values behind and embrace American values.

To all people who support President Trump and the fight to fix the election system here in New Jersey: Please sign up to follow our campaign you can also volunteer and donate at [hirshsingh.com](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=635a36c40a&e=3e017fab0f). Without your support, this fight is not possible.
---
| ###
For any inquiries, please reply to this message or send an email to: [press@hirshsingh.com](mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release)

Additional information is available on our [official website](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=b869aca4dd&e=3e017fab0f) and [Facebook](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=ced11c640e&e=3e017fab0f) page.

Thank you,
**The Singh for Governor Press Team**
_For the People_
