name: =?utf-8?Q?Patrick=20Kibbe?=
subject: Analyzing the numbers and looking ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
Over 114,000 people voted for Pat. It's the most votes a Democrat has received in this race since it was an open seat without an incumbent in 2012. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=51f79d1dac&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | Dear Friend,

Thank you for your support of this campaign. We have spent the last week analyzing the results of this election and want to share some numbers with you. While the ultimate result is not what we had hoped for, there is much we accomplished together.

Over 114,000 people voted for Pat. This is the highest number of votes a Democrat has received in this race since it was an open seat without an incumbent in 2012.

To accomplish that, the campaign worked for nearly 18 months, and in the final push in the last eight weeks alone we built a team of over 300 volunteers, made over 50,000 calls, sent over 100,000 texts, met with thousands at our online and socially distanced in-person events, and reached hundreds of thousands more through TV, radio, and digital platforms. The result of this effort is that over 75% of the voters we contacted turned out to vote, compared to 47% voter turnout overall. This shows the power of our strategy and volunteer effort in turning out the vote.

Pat raised approximately $950,000 and over 95% of these contributions were from individual donors. None was from corporate PACs or from self-financing. Pat followed through with her commitment to be responsible to the people of this District, not outside corporate interests.

All of this was done in an unprecedented pandemic that limited many of the traditional ways we could meet, but did not stop our people-powered effort. Pat received national media attention, including from the New York Times, Newsweek, Marie Claire, NBC News, Time Magazine, and others. Pat is the first candidate in this District to be endorsed by a Presidential nominee who won the Presidency, Joe Biden, and a former Presidential nominee, Pete Buttigieg.

Unfortunately, our shared effort was not enough to win the race. The state of Indiana and this District were hit with a red wave, and Democrats did not turn out in the same numbers as Republicans. For example, 75% of the strongest Republicans turned out to vote, but only 65% of the strongest Democrats did. Similarly, 53% of moderate Republicans voted, but only 41% of moderate Democrats did. There was also a significant increase in Republican straight ticket voters. In 2016 and 2018 there were approximately 65,000 and 69,000 Republican straight ticket votes in IN02, respectively. This year there was approximately 97,000 – a 41% increase. Comparatively, only approximately 56,000 Democrats voted straight ticket this year, a 27% increase from approximately 45,000 in 2018.

This occurred even in St. Joseph County, which has long been the Democratic stronghold in this District. In 2016 there were approximately 19,000 Republican straight ticket votes in St. Joseph County and in 2018 there were approximately 21,000. This year there were almost 35,000 – a 63% increase. Nonetheless, Pat still won St. Joseph County. Out of the 14 competitive races at the federal, state, and county level in St. Joseph County, Democrats won only four – Joe Biden for President, Pat Hackett for U.S. Representative, Jonathan Weinzapfel for Attorney General, and Ryan Dvorak for State Representative District 8. Pat received the second highest votes of any Democrat in St. Joseph County at 58,859 votes, trailing only Joe Biden by 1,000 votes, and winning with 51.34% of the vote.

The numbers show a path forward – one that we have seen from the start. This race is not about the Republicans’ gerrymandering or corporate PAC money. It is about getting out the vote. If everyone in this District voted, Democrats would win with over 50.6% of the vote. COVID-19 made that a challenge in this historic year. We must build a stronger infrastructure as a party, continue to organize, and continue to believe that each and every vote matters in every county in this District. Going forward, we must also ensure that voter files are not unlawfully purged, continue to register new voters, and continue to target and strengthen areas of disenfranchised voters.

As Pat often quoted on the campaign trail from Eleanor Roosevelt’s statement at the 1940 Democratic Convention, “No one candidate on his or her own can carry this alone. It can only be carried by a united people who love their county.”

We are proud of what we accomplished together. We know there is more work to do. We are ready to do it because Dignity and Justice for All is worth fighting for. Pat, I, and the entire team thank you for joining us in this effort.

Patrick Kibbe
Campaign Manager

---

name: Christina Finello
subject: For everything, thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finello for Congress
body:
The results for our race are in, and unfortunately, it didn’t turn out as we had hoped. I am so proud of the campaign we have built over the last year and what we have fought for, and I want to say thank you.

---
| Peter,

The results for our race are in, and unfortunately, it didn’t turn out as we had hoped. I am so proud of the campaign we have built over the last year and what we have fought for, and I want to say thank you.

I got into this race to be a fighter. A fighter for Pennsylvanians who deserve affordable healthcare. A fighter for families struggling through the economic impact of this pandemic. A fighter for the people of Bucks and Montgomery Counties, the people who have shaped who I am and have given me so much.

Although I won’t be heading to Washington,_I will never stop fighting for our community_.

I want to thank all of you for making this campaign possible. I am so thankful for each and every one of you who donated, wrote, called, sent texts, hosted fundraisers, and put up a sign. Being your candidate has been the privilege of my lifetime, and I am so honored to have had your support.

As a mom of two young girls, I know it takes a village. Everything this campaign has accomplished is thanks to all of you. Together, we have built a grassroots movement in PA-01, and our fight for a better future for our children will not go unnoticed.

I hope I made you proud. I am so grateful to have each of you alongside me on this journey.

Best,

Christina
---

* * *
| | Paid for by Finello for Congress
---
Finello for Congress
P.O. Box 2772
Warminster, PA 18974
United States

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: One-stop shop for COVID test results
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
We've been working to make testing as accessible as possible, bringing it into communities, in local health clinics, in doctor's offices, and in public buildings. But there hasn't been one clear process for getting your results. Now, we've changed that. To make getting your test results easier, we've made it possible for all Rhode Islanders to get your results from [a single place](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KKbIDGN3cRY9NZnSI4gMGySwJIsim1Dd9OUqkyE2gXzpjTYLaCtCmWauPq2gEw7o1q5SzBJ4h3zv3TfS6oka5Flv8FZBVj2bpYuXTakkWMBMusO8rBrSrtkMxghhWTJsflPfzhNXacCiw-YKRW4wxg==&c=zLohDmuYkmxxnINdMw9qYw62Cyg0UXUxp0Z0GQqpsLX9ymTUEnitHA==&ch=boHa3OqZHXIOhP1D0jD-q2OtH5OL2PE35RZ8RKqZMahVfGczKpJ_Zw==), no matter how you scheduled your test.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KKbIDGN3cRY9NZnSI4gMGySwJIsim1Dd9OUqkyE2gXzpjTYLaCtCmedRoSUhO3mo8-uveMo80EIMiJ8Njrh2sFJLD7DqwNYcleuzwpS5rUO2sNGJZ0ipUmt4cVIysw7iRzalnwE3hMggUZJDuqpkuZyNCr9vPaEdXQLsNWnhgl3bKKrtXnb43w1K-mjlpiT2Tmr2LwQsugw=&c=zLohDmuYkmxxnINdMw9qYw62Cyg0UXUxp0Z0GQqpsLX9ymTUEnitHA==&ch=boHa3OqZHXIOhP1D0jD-q2OtH5OL2PE35RZ8RKqZMahVfGczKpJ_Zw==)
---
| Right now, everyone in Rhode Island can access your test result by going to [portal.ri.gov/results](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KKbIDGN3cRY9NZnSI4gMGySwJIsim1Dd9OUqkyE2gXzpjTYLaCtCmWauPq2gEw7o1q5SzBJ4h3zv3TfS6oka5Flv8FZBVj2bpYuXTakkWMBMusO8rBrSrtkMxghhWTJsflPfzhNXacCiw-YKRW4wxg==&c=zLohDmuYkmxxnINdMw9qYw62Cyg0UXUxp0Z0GQqpsLX9ymTUEnitHA==&ch=boHa3OqZHXIOhP1D0jD-q2OtH5OL2PE35RZ8RKqZMahVfGczKpJ_Zw==). It doesn't matter if you scheduled through the state's portal, if you went through the K-12 system, or if you were tested at a doctor's office. When you log in, you will go through a two-factor authentication using the phone number or email you provided at the time of your test. Remember, if your results come back positive, immediately isolate yourself and reach out to your close contacts. Don't wait for a call from the Department of Health to begin this process.
Now is not the time to let our guard down. There's a light at the end of the tunnel, and we all need to rally together for the next few months in order to get there. Let's recommit ourselves right now to following the rules in order to keep ourselves, our families, and our neighbors safe until we have a vaccine. It won't be easy, but I know we can do this together.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KKbIDGN3cRY9NZnSI4gMGySwJIsim1Dd9OUqkyE2gXzpjTYLaCtCmWauPq2gEw7oqp9kMA636Zy3xJ_hpfKdWTjqZnYtBF0dOAaPhixnCJPfcdJKuqBGP49w6boByYHQ5fAyr85CVDWzMXg8JqA59RRQKHRLn4Hgz1GlTa1BmN7l5qtTV95qkldKKXlmGecYlsXSwXMOssIXPjdv1xdbgQz7X-u7zHQKIzKJ_3AVW6brGLGemKX43St5vXQ5nV6nz5lZWH97Hl-zs7bHfMlkb5ieQocXYqxH-GiUZe7dhPHffo77W8DKKh5h8GjAPO3nJGHEqQIC-04=&c=zLohDmuYkmxxnINdMw9qYw62Cyg0UXUxp0Z0GQqpsLX9ymTUEnitHA==&ch=boHa3OqZHXIOhP1D0jD-q2OtH5OL2PE35RZ8RKqZMahVfGczKpJ_Zw==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903

body:
IA-02 needs conservative Mariannette Miller Meeks! &zwnj
Friend, Iowa conservative Mariannette Miller-Meeks is the leader that the 2nd congressional district deserves. She is a veteran, doctor, and state senator who will be an ally for me in the House. Democrats are FURIOUS that Dr. Miller-Meeks won this seat by 47 votes, and they have already demanded a recount. Dr. Miller-Meeks is already setting up a recount fund in order to protect the integrity of this election. clean_body: IA-02 needs conservative Mariannette Miller Meeks! &zwnj Friend, Iowa conservative Mariannette Miller-Meeks is the leader that the 2nd congressional district deserves. She is a veteran, doctor, and state senator who will be an ally for me in the House. Democrats are FURIOUS that Dr. Miller-Meeks won this seat by 47 votes, and they have already demanded a recount. Dr. Miller-Meeks is already setting up a recount fund in order to protect the integrity of this election. == == Like myself, Mariannette is pro-life, pro-Second Amendment, and will go to Congress and be a fearless leader for our families and our workers. She is ready to do whatever it takes to serve the families of IA-02 and ensure our workers have a seat at the table. Team Hinson is supporting the 2020 Miller-Meeks ' Recount Fund and Friend, we need you to contribute if Mariannette is going keep her seat. == == == == == Friend, we are relying on your support and hope you recognize the urgency in playing a part in this critical election. Right now, control of the Senate stands on a knife’s edge, with Republicans holding 50 seats and the Democrats controlling 48 seats.
If the Democrats win in Georgia, they’ll gain control -- and they’ll be able to pass every crazy idea that emerges from Nancy Pelosi’s Congress.
[Unless we meet today’s $13,365 fundraising goal, we won’t have the resources that we need to fight back and win. We need your help to get there, Peter. But keep in mind that if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay engaged with the Republican campaigns that you support.

Please send a personal check made payable to “Elect Republicans” to the address above to contribute by mail. Be sure to provide your full name, mailing address, email address, occupation, and employer with your mailed contribution.

Contributions to Elect Republicans are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes and will be used in connection with federal elections.

Federal law requires Elect Republicans to use its best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year.

Contributions from individuals to Elect Republicans of up to $5,000 per year are designated to the Elect Republicans candidate contribution account. Any amount over $5,000 per year is designated to the Elect Republicans Carey account.

The use of the name and likeness of any candidate or officeholder by Elect Republicans is for Elect Republicans’ political communication only. IN NO WAY does it indicate any authorization by, affiliation with, direction from, or endorsement by that person of any kind.

By subscribing to our emails, you agree to our [Privacy Policy](http://www.electrepublicans.org/privacy?e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ant_p&n=23).

To update your email preferences, . Today, Georgia begins a hand recount of its General Election ballots. If the Democrats win in Georgia, they’ll gain control -- and they’ll be able to pass every crazy idea that emerges from Nancy Pelosi’s Congress. If you've saved your payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through immediately. | | | | | | | | | Thank you. \-- Elect Republicans

subject: Saving our Majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler

| | | | | |

| Friend,
As part of a strong effort to keep Georgia red and save the Republican Majority, Kelly hit the ground running this week - holding massive grassroots events, standing up for accurate election results, and exposing the radical record of Democrat Raphael Warnock.
In her first two events of the runoff cycle, Kelly was joined by Senator [Marco Rubio](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WG3J-yizDiLOEsxG6lZwqITaljvs9matnFQT9to5b0SxQnJSkXHsloZ4L8CSmHovpHVHzm6aljpSnDQRgyvyjinwuLX4v7J6WInmL71N7iQfReVH5seaJlA_MUZ1zxNJPeEdCWx7RLXoQCnJ9P4K5LtIGcAp9vOB26jNsZR75Ymt-e2iGqwQQp9JEOWBUbrByLBEu6B0AHFn-vpVfOJkpg1fXAjlz72zaTriqmS78XFZzzKgwyz6c76Zdrh7X7ftdB_TGZiNgSQvFyI8D4IV9suO7Ope-BJSnKd2_Ql4Ewsia3v-HLZWagwesCLtd3fj2zSHBdNec6c=&c=qUQV0sarSXgDU1b9pTYVP9uIydtf3C4Gf_b769vOrwj2kiWb2paUOw==&ch=KKkOwnw_E4x4l_NWlWVC5n9p2kV85d1s-VSOR6Q3iqzbCyFI7RhcRQ==) (R-FL) in [Cobb County](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WG3J-yizDiLOEsxG6lZwqITaljvs9matnFQT9to5b0SxQnJSkXHsloZ4L8CSmHov1Yk3fg9XEppnvyBjJ8GXcNFyla4z3kQtK-tfq4cZ2W-QxCFDMpdz6P3HORY9prMcxVW20MClbC9G6I9gu_7y0Y781L0EmFWnNlkN-TnJhJtBrJ-1RwQJC9jy9jZq4sJo7pebNSD9HkCe9AAWkRd35_N5RANeVdVh0z_7f0sEzoY7EF52HfEdaWXnspgIzaVvBbd0TKIpklYRQ83v9bzC4OJP0DP7Q7GNZsIL90wEVLrzmzPVMdAN5dT8RUYoFclN4GgznKKtqqCzdu0AoXX73pI8Mu9MbGYZPuseLAn3V6uiChF-JaHXu5CvtSQyHNmLE4YU-CRY7k4=&c=qUQV0sarSXgDU1b9pTYVP9uIydtf3C4Gf_b769vOrwj2kiWb2paUOw==&ch=KKkOwnw_E4x4l_NWlWVC5n9p2kV85d1s-VSOR6Q3iqzbCyFI7RhcRQ==) on Wednesday and Senator Rick Scott (R-FL) in [Forsyth County](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WG3J-yizDiLOEsxG6lZwqITaljvs9matnFQT9to5b0SxQnJSkXHsloZ4L8CSmHovBiP8H_QW2J6nWipvcQ0AfA2ugs1ZmUU6d0TAlDeEoZ-Y4IhZkWoeh8tg4Ic_rs4j_Bumx8lJ88fNOVEQcBByMzD3EVJLK0tlIog2BrFs-wRj0U0bAnWy6C_iNvkSWNK5zf7TZZCYCzSXrr5HZugWq3-SHPkVsh7ZpkZRWI3OGCy289j4DHmMP1tlQohYlwQZc-PSz6P-V9sScoR3EU36aM2eyT8sdQvQ8Qn78yNabq4ZEfD65UVzKIKZFGX4fOUmNsNdeKfToFTSeLeY_ksZFJVaDcus0lnuDBySuBV--vIeUU9Or_aE3yE6GObTM3gEEi56q1-69r8=&c=qUQV0sarSXgDU1b9pTYVP9uIydtf3C4Gf_b769vOrwj2kiWb2paUOw==&ch=KKkOwnw_E4x4l_NWlWVC5n9p2kV85d1s-VSOR6Q3iqzbCyFI7RhcRQ==) today. It’s been a _long_ four years as Donald Trump put our country through some of its toughest, darkest moments. **But as the country was watching, voters in Nevada showed we’re ready to push forward and restore decency, integrity, and empathy in our democracy.** Nevada sent a message that we want leaders who will unite rather than divide us, prioritize an economy that puts working families first, expand access to health care, protect our right to vote, and defeat this pandemic. I am so proud of the work that grassroots volunteers have done to fuel this win. This was a long, hard fought election cycle to protect Battleground Nevada and every single phone call that was made, text that was sent, door that was knocked, and donation that was made _mattered._ So thank you, thank you, thank you. For your support and for your determination to create a better, stronger future for Nevadans and all Americans. Take time to celebrate, but the fight still continues to make our state a place where every family can thrive. Republicans spent millions of dollars to narrow the gap on winning this battleground state, and looking forward we have essential seats to protect in the next election. Our grassroots operation wasn’t built overnight, and we’re continuing to build on these wins step-by-step. **[So if you can, please make a recurring monthly $5 donation to help our Democratic organizing efforts continue to grow strong:](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlDPxDHCSe8GlVxjXZtZRt3jlCQA7GjIoNjXSjTpNiOWgJKkjJpv-hMx7C5aw4icZtKn_VLFEBPL7JRyhuTZiINsnENurCD0bEUmb09FZkgk-PHFZdaROLghas7YH6gQWMWuKEnLyn_LpMwV5oP7xgvKpOfI5vWfUOP45_NUEi32IYjkRQDl8NM7GuJ446WjYu68y0J4PySHCdM22OD9zRElH8ZhU_GUELBkCeMYDssqd5_Us_rTrycUVjvXvK0JRen5X50AF8vXV796GWKVfuSCKjgHNOBBuKLd9x38b13edg4waedZfpsWvj5txb4zp8SZvbCJGJ5GcAIz80TuTnB5CxAONtWxSCrKxkTiTmVfYQqflc5mv_xDT3p434rTtmZ99svVzgxsZtte-k8nI3tdUxKpSlCsmXKv60OSOLtg/36u/qGmWUUXwTIComm1clzM8bg/h2/lzVMt9PF0U1KwQrA6eAsZcCCjCemnxHac1IcpdoOgNs)** | | | [Chip in → ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlDPxDHCSe8GlVxjXZtZRt3jlCQA7GjIoNjXSjTpNiOWgJKkjJpv-hMx7C5aw4icZtKn_VLFEBPL7JRyhuTZiINsnENurCD0bEUmb09FZkgqp7-v_jdVGxHDJcYYlg1xliZT0xwj8KXt1sLXHCTLd-C5UfRGZ8oHcTeByycBmmSx5oTRS8aN7SFJGT0vnyeD9z3JUITTe5dxdoSnB5v3WFjeWmmXqXjuAa2gUCO75DGgTzjI2-Wy3AmhlqKF4ciRKLAGi2t-uewKa2gYjponCIlF2JiE04o3jO3VqXiJ4o0DG1m6Vg58ozvxJXqGOqbDZL8tdLbSO9fN0YhSVvdIO53h5T772zg_TGps4hVpwX-uzm3dLQvfUL3SxC-3OOXbHACWUDGNmsP6_thgFBwyFS6yFzvcZT3bLKTNU_jMkZqg/36u/qGmWUUXwTIComm1clzM8bg/h3/S-aT9vtUR3v8AW7q_cCnLMY4QJeACl06wKaWmy5PIk0)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
Feds Strike Deal to Make COVID-19 Vaccine Free at Major Pharmacies; Trump’s Economy Really Was Better Than Obama’s; Pence: Veterans Day Is a Time to.. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c83dcb8e50&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | **[Feds Strike Deal to Make COVID-19 Vaccine Free at Major Pharmacies](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=be7e778f94&e=3ee4985eea "https://nypost.com/2020/11/12/feds-strike-deal-to-make-covid-19-vaccine-free-at-major-pharmacies/")**
_-New York Post_
“COVID-19 vaccinations will eventually be available free at neighborhood pharmacy chains—just as flu shots are now—thanks to an agreement announced by federal health officials on Thursday,” Laura Italiano reports. “Optimism for an effective vaccine rose this week after news that the shot being developed by Pfizer and BioNTech is more than 90 percent effective.”

**LIVE at 4 p.m. ET:**[**President Trump gives update on Operation Warp Speed**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=11cc99beff&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| **[Trump’s Economy Really Was Better Than Obama’s](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4d5fdfa0eb&e=3ee4985eea)**
-_Bloomberg_
“In 2016, real median household income was $62,898, just $257 above its level in 1999. Over the next three years it grew almost $6,000, to $68,703. That’s perhaps why, despite the pandemic, 56% of U.S. voters polled last month said their families were better off today than they were four years ago,” Karl Smith writes.
---
|
---
| [**Vice President Pence: Veterans Day Is a Time to Thank and Appreciate Heroes Who Have Preserved Our Liberty**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c5f711de63&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“Every veteran of the armed forces of the United States is a hero to the American people,” Vice President Mike Pence writes. “As a father of a Marine Corps captain and a father-in-law of a Navy lieutenant who’s currently deployed, I couldn’t be more proud to be vice president to a president who cares so deeply about the men and women of our armed forces and every veteran in America.”

**MORE: **[**Free National Park Entrance for Veterans and Gold Star Families**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=908a0939f2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Businesses Trying to Rebound After Unrest Face a Challenge: Not Enough Insurance**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=784ec705e2&e=3ee4985eea)
_-The New York Times_
“It’s a prominent refrain these days from activists in the aftermath of arson and looting—businesses have insurance. Buildings can be repaired. Broken glass is a small price to pay in a movement for justice,” Nellie Bowles writes. But for many small businesses and entrepreneurs, “there is no easy way to replace all that they lost.”
---
|
---
| [**Trump Bars Americans From Investing in Firms That Help China’s Military**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a9a3eec72e&e=3ee4985eea)
_-The Wall Street Journal_
“American Capital should not be used to finance the construction of Chinese Communist weapons literally aimed at killing Americans and driving the US military out of Asia,” White House Director of Trade and Manufacturing Policy Peter Navarro says. “This strong action by President Trump puts a stop to that Wall Street insanity.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f1cad2eb68&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=24b6242f1d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=fb00a00052)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Christy Smith
subject: Where we are
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | It's nail-bitingly close, Peter --

After updates from election officials over the last couple of days, we're _down by just 219 votes_ in the vote count.

**The voice of every last voter in CA-25 _must_ be heard before a winner is declared.** We'll keep fighting to make sure that the people's right to choose their representative is upheld, and we're assembling a team of lawyers to lead the charge and planning for a recount, which is increasingly likely.

Bottom line, we have just a few days to raise $125,000 to pay for lawyers, cure ballots, and do everything we can to make sure every vote is counted.

**[So, I need to ask, Peter: Can you pitch in $5 or more to help?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6be41/29776869/809ca26/569dad41/132794601/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDExMTNfcmVjb3VudDhyZXNlbmRfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2011_email_christysmithrecount?refcode=em20_201113_recount8resend_in")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6be41/29776869/809ca26/569dad42/132794601/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDExMTNfcmVjb3VudDhyZXNlbmRfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2011_email_christysmithrecount?refcode=em20_201113_recount8resend_in&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $22.44](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6be41/29776869/809ca26/569dad43/132794601/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDExMTNfcmVjb3VudDhyZXNlbmRfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2011_email_christysmithrecount?refcode=em20_201113_recount8resend_in&express_lane=true&amount=22.44")

[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6be41/29776869/809ca26/569dad5e/132794601/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDExMTNfcmVjb3VudDhyZXNlbmRfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2011_email_christysmithrecount?refcode=em20_201113_recount8resend_in&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6be41/29776869/809ca26/569dad41/132794601/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDExMTNfcmVjb3VudDhyZXNlbmRfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2011_email_christysmithrecount?refcode=em20_201113_recount8resend_in")
Joe Biden and Kamala Harris will _need_ committed leaders working with them to further the values we share: That country must come before party, and truth must prevail over lies.

Ours is one of the last House races in the entire country that is still too close to call -- and it's one of our only remaining chances to flip a red seat blue. We _can_ win this, Peter. But only with your support.

**[Please, chip in $5 or more right now to our recount fund to help make sure the people of the 25th district are heard in this election.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6be41/29776869/809ca26/569dad41/132794601/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDExMTNfcmVjb3VudDhyZXNlbmRfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2011_email_christysmithrecount?refcode=em20_201113_recount8resend_in")**

Thank you,

Christy

[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6be41/29776869/809ca26/569dad41/132794601/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDExMTNfcmVjb3VudDhyZXNlbmRfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2011_email_christysmithrecount?refcode=em20_201113_recount8resend_in")
Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors in Ventura and LA county on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this top pick-up House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6be41/29776869/809ca26/569dad41/132794601/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDExMTNfcmVjb3VudDhyZXNlbmRfaW4ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2011_email_christysmithrecount?refcode=em20_201113_recount8resend_in")

clean_body: | []() | | It's nail-bitingly close, Peter -- After updates from election officials over the last couple of days, we're down by just 219 votes in the vote count. The voice of every last voter in CA-25 must be heard before a winner is declared. We'll keep fighting to make sure that the people's right to choose their representative is upheld, and we're assembling a team of lawyers to lead the charge and planning for a recount, which is increasingly likely. Bottom line, we have just a few days to raise $125,000 to pay for lawyers, cure ballots, and do everything we can to make sure every vote is counted.
